# Copilot Instructions

<!-- Source of truth: AGENTS.md. Keep this file in sync when AGENTS.md changes.       -->
<!-- In Copilot Agent/Edits mode, the pointer below is usually sufficient.             -->
<!-- In Copilot Chat, paste the full contents of AGENTS.md below instead, or attach   -->
<!-- AGENTS.md explicitly to the chat context at the start of each session.            -->

Read `AGENTS.md` in the workspace root and follow all instructions found there.
